• Procedural mining world with ores, upgrades, explosives and teleporters.
  • Full UI: mobile controls, HUD gauges, chat, server list, admin panel, shop, inventory and save system.
  • Audio engine, custom texture support, host election, cloud sync and configurable graphics.
    Game.init()
    Shop.buy(item)

This page implements a multiplayer mining game with a procedurally generated map, player stats, upgrades, and an extensive UI. It includes networking, sound, custom textures, saving, and admin functionality, all styled with a minimalist, bevel‑border design.
